title: MaxNotify

send_message.name: Send message
send_message.description: Send a text message to Max. Pick a MaxNotify notify entity or integration (if you have only one entry, entity is enough).

entity_id.name: Notify entity
entity_id.description: MaxNotify notify entity (chat) to send to. You can select multiple.

message.name: Message
message.description: Text of the message to send.

format.name: Text format
format.description: Message text format: text, markdown, or html. Overrides integration message format for this send.

send_keyboard.name: Send keyboard
send_keyboard.description: When enabled (default), the integration default inline keyboard is used if you omit Buttons or leave it empty; non-empty Buttons replace it. When disabled, only non-empty Buttons from this call are attached.

config_entry_id.name: Integration
config_entry_id.description: MaxNotify config entry when you have several; targets are that entry's notify entities.

recipient_id.name: Recipient ID
recipient_id.description: Chat/recipient ID (same as in max_notify_received). Use with Integration when Target is not set — sends only to this chat.

buttons.name: Buttons
buttons.description: Custom inline buttons. Formats: object map (Text -> payload), list of objects (text, payload), or rows of objects (type: callback|message|link, text, payload/url). Link buttons require http(s) URLs only. How they combine with the default keyboard is controlled by Send keyboard.

notify.name: Notify
notify.description: If disabled, send without notifying recipients (silent).

send_text_to_all.name: Send text to all (experimental)
send_text_to_all.description: Send a text message to all configured MaxNotify recipients across all integrations.

message.name: Message
message.description: Text of the message to send.

format.name: Text format
format.description: Message text format: text, markdown, or html. Overrides integration message format for this send.

send_keyboard.name: Send keyboard
send_keyboard.description: When enabled (default), the integration default inline keyboard is used if you omit Buttons or leave it empty; non-empty Buttons replace it. When disabled, only non-empty Buttons from this call are attached.

buttons.name: Buttons
buttons.description: Custom inline buttons. Formats: object map (Text -> payload), list of objects (text, payload), or rows of objects (type: callback|message|link, text, payload/url). Link buttons require http(s) URLs only. How they combine with the default keyboard is controlled by Send keyboard.

notify.name: Notify
notify.description: If disabled, send without notifying recipients (silent).

send_photo.name: Send photo
send_photo.description: Send a photo to Max chat(s). File: local path or image URL.

files.name: Files
files.description: List of local paths or URLs. Sends multiple attachments in one message.

entity_id.name: Notify entity
entity_id.description: MaxNotify notify entity to send to. You can select multiple.

config_entry_id.name: Integration
config_entry_id.description: MaxNotify config entry when you have several.

recipient_id.name: Recipient ID
recipient_id.description: Chat/recipient ID (same as in max_notify_received). Use with Integration when Target is not set — sends only to this chat.

disable_ssl.name: Disable SSL verification
disable_ssl.description: Disables SSL certificate validation for this operation. Use only for endpoints with self-signed or invalid certificates.

url_auth_type.name: URL auth type
url_auth_type.description: Authentication type for media URL download: basic, digest or bearer. Required when URL or parameters include credentials.

url_auth_login.name: URL auth login
url_auth_login.description: Login for basic or digest auth.

url_auth_password.name: URL auth password
url_auth_password.description: Password for basic or digest auth.

count_requests.name: Count requests
count_requests.description: How many times to POST the message while waiting for attachment processing (attachment.not.ready). Increase for large files.

format.name: Text format
format.description: Format for caption and message text: text, markdown, or html. Overrides integration message format for this send.

send_keyboard.name: Send keyboard
send_keyboard.description: When enabled (default), the integration default inline keyboard is used if you omit Buttons or leave it empty; non-empty Buttons replace it. When disabled, only non-empty Buttons from this call are attached.

buttons.name: Buttons
buttons.description: Custom inline buttons. Formats: object map (Text -> payload), list of objects (text, payload), or rows of objects (type: callback|message|link, text, payload/url). Link buttons require http(s) URLs only. How they combine with the default keyboard is controlled by Send keyboard.

notify.name: Notify
notify.description: If disabled, send without notifying recipients (silent).

send_document.name: Send document
send_document.description: Send one file as document to Max chat(s). May preserve quality vs. send_photo.

file.name: File
file.description: Local path or file URL — sent as document in Max.

entity_id.name: Notify entity
entity_id.description: MaxNotify notify entity to send to.

config_entry_id.name: Integration
config_entry_id.description: MaxNotify config entry when you have several.

recipient_id.name: Recipient ID
recipient_id.description: Chat/recipient ID (same as in max_notify_received). Use with Integration when Target is not set — sends only to this chat.

disable_ssl.description: Disables SSL certificate validation for this operation. Use only for endpoints with self-signed or invalid certificates.

url_auth_type.description: Authentication type for media URL download: basic, digest or bearer. Required when URL or parameters include credentials.

url_auth_login.name: URL auth login
url_auth_login.description: Login for basic or digest auth.

url_auth_password.name: URL auth password
url_auth_password.description: Password for basic or digest auth.

format.name: Text format

Link buttons require http(s) URLs only. How they combine with the default keyboard is controlled by Send keyboard.

notify.name: Notify
notify.description: If disabled, send without notifying recipients (silent).

send_video.name: Send video
send_video.description: Send a video to Max chat(s). File: local path or URL (mp4, mov, webm, mkv).

file.name: File
file.description: Local path or video URL (mp4, mov, webm, mkv).

files.name: Files
files.description: List of local paths or URLs. Sends multiple attachments in one message.

entity_id.name: Notify entity
entity_id.description: MaxNotify notify entity to send to.

config_entry_id.name: Integration
config_entry_id.description: MaxNotify config entry when you have several.

recipient_id.name: Recipient ID
recipient_id.description: Chat/recipient ID (same as in max_notify_received). Use with Integration when Target is not set — sends only to this chat.

disable_ssl.name: Disable SSL verification
disable_ssl.description: Disables SSL certificate validation for this operation. Use only for endpoints with self-signed or invalid certificates.

url_auth_type.name: URL auth type
url_auth_type.description: Authentication type for media URL download: basic, digest or bearer. Required when URL or parameters include credentials.

url_auth_login.name: URL auth login
url_auth_login.description: Login for basic or digest auth.

url_auth_password.name: URL auth password
url_auth_password.description: Password for basic or digest auth.

count_requests.description: How many times to POST the message while waiting for attachment processing (attachment.not.ready). Increase for large videos.

format.name: Text format
format.description: Format for caption and message text: text, markdown, or html. Overrides integration message format for this send.

send_keyboard.name: Send keyboard
send_keyboard.description: When enabled (default), the integration default inline keyboard is used if you omit Buttons or leave it empty; non-empty Buttons replace it. When disabled, only non-empty Buttons from this call are attached.

buttons.name: Buttons
buttons.description: Custom inline buttons. Formats: object map (Text -> payload), list of objects (text, payload), or rows of objects (type: callback|message|link, text, payload/url). Link buttons require http(s) URLs only. How they combine with the default keyboard is controlled by Send keyboard.

notify.name: Notify
notify.description: If disabled, send without notifying recipients (silent).

delete_message.name: Delete message
delete_message.description: Delete a message in Max by ID. Use message_id from max_notify_received event. Messages older than 24 hours cannot be deleted.

message_id.name: Message ID
message_id.description: ID of the message to delete (e.g. from trigger.event.data.message_id).

message_ids.name: Message IDs
message_ids.description: List of message IDs to delete in order.

date.name: Date
date.description: One calendar day (local 00:00–23:59). Date only or Unix timestamp. Ignored if message_id or message_ids is set; otherwise takes precedence over the period start/end fields.

from.name: From
from.description: Period start (with period end): Unix timestamp or date/datetime. Used only without message_id, message_ids, and without Date.

to.name: To
to.description: Period end (with period start): same formats as period start. Both bounds required when using this mode.

entity_id.name: Notify entity
entity_id.description: MaxNotify notify entity. Can be used instead of config_entry_id.

config_entry_id.name: Integration
config_entry_id.description: MaxNotify integration to use (required if multiple exist).

recipient_id.name: Recipient ID
recipient_id.description: When deleting by time range: limit to this chat (same ID as in max_notify_received).

delete_last_outgoing_message.name: Delete last outgoing message
delete_last_outgoing_message.description: Find and delete the latest outgoing bot message in a selected group chat. Available for Official Max API.

config_entry_id.name: Integration
config_entry_id.description: MaxNotify integration (required if multiple integrations exist and no entity is specified).

scan_count.name: Scan count
scan_count.description: How many recent messages to scan in the chat while looking for the last outgoing bot message.

edit_message.name: Edit message
edit_message.description: Edit a message in Max: change text, set or remove inline buttons. Messages older than 24 hours cannot be edited.

message_id.name: Message ID
message_id.description: ID of the message to edit (e.g. from trigger.event.data.message_id).

text.name: Text
text.description: New message text. Omit to keep current.

send_keyboard.name: Send keyboard
send_keyboard.description: When enabled (default) and you set Buttons: empty Buttons restore the integration default keyboard; non-empty Buttons replace the message keyboard. When disabled, only non-empty Buttons from this call are applied.

buttons.name: Buttons
buttons.description: Custom inline buttons. Formats: object map (Text -> payload), list of objects (text, payload), rows of objects (type: callback|message|link, text, payload/url), or list of rows. Link buttons require http(s) URLs only. Interaction with the default keyboard is controlled by Send keyboard.

remove_buttons.name: Remove buttons
remove_buttons.description: If true, remove all inline buttons from the message.

format.name: Text format
format.description: Message text format: text, markdown, or html.

entity_id.name: Notify entity
entity_id.description: MaxNotify notify entity. Can be used instead of config_entry_id.

config_entry_id.name: Integration
config_entry_id.description: MaxNotify integration to use (required if multiple exist).

recipient_id.name: Recipient ID
recipient_id.description: Chat/recipient ID (same as in max_notify_received). Use with Integration when Target is not set.

delete_from_to_both_required: Fill both «Period start» and «Period end», or clear both if you use message_id, message_ids, or «Date» instead.
delete_requires_id_date_or_period: To delete by chat you must also set how to find messages: message_id, message_ids, field «Date», or both «Period start» and «Period end». Only selecting a notify entity is not enough.
provider_delete_by_period_not_supported: {provider} does not support deleting messages by date or time range. Use message_id or message_ids.
provider_delete_last_outgoing_not_suppor: {provider} does not support deleting the last outgoing message.
missing_target: Choose where to send: set Target to your MaxNotify notify entity (e.g. notify.maxnotify_…), or if you have several MaxNotify integrations pick the correct one under Integration (config_entry_id).
invalid_config_entry: Wrong integration id in «Integration» (config_entry_id): {config_entry_id}. Open Settings → Devices & services → MaxNotify and copy the id from the integration card.
missing_config_entry_id: You have several MaxNotify integrations — pick which one to use: set «Integration» (config_entry_id) in the action, or select a notify entity so Home Assistant knows the chat.
config_entry_entity_mismatch: The integration id ({config_entry_id}) does not belong to the selected notify entity. Either remove «Integration» and keep only the entity, or set Integration to {resolved_entry_id}.
no_matching_entities: No notify entities found for this integration id ({config_entry_id}). Add a chat in MaxNotify or check that the id matches Settings → Devices & services.
recipient_id_no_notify_entity: No notify entity for integration id {config_entry_id} with recipient_id {recipient_id}. Check the chat ID or pick Target (notify entity) in the action.
plain_recipient_not_resolved: Could not resolve recipient. Check the notify entity and integration settings.
delete_last_outgoing_group_only: This action works only for group chats (recipient_id < 0). For personal chats, delete by explicit message_id (for example, save it right after sending).
delete_message_permission_denied: No permission to delete messages. In a group chat, make the bot an administrator and grant it permission to delete messages.
delete_message_no_access_token: This integration has no access token configured.
delete_message_unauthorized: The bot token was rejected (unauthorized). Check the token in Max developer settings.
delete_message_not_found: The message was not found or cannot be deleted: {detail}.
delete_message_network_error: Network error while deleting the message: {error}.
third_party_attachment_too_large: {provider} accepts photos and documents up to {max_mib} MB; this file is about {size_mib} MB.
third_party_video_too_large: {provider} accepts video up to {max_mib} MB; this file is about {size_mib} MB.
third_party_video_upload_incomplete: {provider}: video upload response must contain url and token.
attachments_count_limit_exceeded: {provider} allows up to {max_count} attachments per message (files + inline keyboard); requested: {actual_count}.
send_message_failed_after_retries: Could not send the message after {attempts} attempts. Error: {error}.
link_button_url_http_https_only: Link button URL must use http or https (received: {url}).
service_datetime_empty: Date or time is empty. Enter a value or fix the template.
service_invalid_calendar_date: Invalid calendar date in «{field_name}». Check day/month/year (e.g. 31 February is invalid).
service_invalid_date_format_expected: Wrong date format in «{field_name}». Use YYYY-MM-DD, DD-MM-YYYY, or Unix time in milliseconds; examples: 2026-10-23, 23.10.2026.
service_date_without_time_only: Field «{field_name}» must be a date without time (delete by single day). Remove the time part.
service_invalid_time_format: Invalid time: use HH:MM:SS or HH-MM-SS (24-hour).
service_invalid_clock_values: Invalid time: hour must be 0–23, minutes and seconds 0–59.
service_invalid_datetime_value: Invalid date and time in «{field_name}». Check date, time and timezone.
service_field_cannot_be_null: Field «{field_name}» is missing. Provide a value or fix the automation.
service_field_cannot_be_empty: Field «{field_name}» is empty. Fill it in or fix the template.
service_delete_date_bad_type: Field «{field_name}»: use a text date or Unix timestamp (number). Other types are not supported.
service_url_auth_need_type: You set URL login/password or token — also set «URL auth type» (url_auth_type): basic, digest, or bearer.
service_url_auth_bearer_need_token: For url_auth_type «bearer» you must set url_auth_token.
service_url_auth_token_bearer_only: url_auth_token is only used with url_auth_type «bearer». For basic/digest use login and password.
service_url_auth_login_password_pairs: For basic or digest auth set both url_auth_login and url_auth_password together.
service_url_auth_basic_digest_only_login: Login and password are only used with url_auth_type «basic» or «digest».
service_files_not_list: Parameter «files» must be a YAML list of paths or URLs, e.g. files: ["/config/file.jpg"].
service_files_items_not_strings: Each item in «files» must be a text path or URL.
service_files_none_given: No file paths: set «file» or non-empty «files».
service_send_document_use_file_not_files: send_document accepts one file only — use the «file» field, not «files».
service_send_document_one_file_only: send_document: attach exactly one file (path or URL).

delete_from_to_both_required.message: Fill both «Period start» and «Period end», or clear both if you use message_id, message_ids, or «Date» instead.

delete_requires_id_date_or_period.message: To delete by chat you must also set how to find messages: message_id, message_ids, field «Date», or both «Period start» and «Period end». Only selecting a notify entity is not enough.

provider_delete_by_period_not_supported.message: {provider} does not support deleting messages by date or time range. Use message_id or message_ids.

provider_delete_last_outgoing_not_suppor.message: {provider} does not support deleting the last outgoing message.

missing_target.message: Choose where to send: set Target to your MaxNotify notify entity (e.g. notify.maxnotify_…), or if you have several MaxNotify integrations pick the correct one under Integration (config_entry_id).

invalid_config_entry.message: Wrong integration id in «Integration» (config_entry_id): {config_entry_id}. Open Settings → Devices & services → MaxNotify and copy the id from the integration card.

missing_config_entry_id.message: You have several MaxNotify integrations — pick which one to use: set «Integration» (config_entry_id) in the action, or select a notify entity so Home Assistant knows the chat.

config_entry_entity_mismatch.message: The integration id ({config_entry_id}) does not belong to the selected notify entity. Either remove «Integration» and keep only the entity, or set Integration to {resolved_entry_id}.

no_matching_entities.message: No notify entities found for this integration id ({config_entry_id}). Add a chat in MaxNotify or check that the id matches Settings → Devices & services.

recipient_id_no_notify_entity.message: No notify entity for integration id {config_entry_id} with recipient_id {recipient_id}. Check the chat ID or pick Target (notify entity) in the action.

plain_recipient_not_resolved.message: Could not resolve recipient. Check the notify entity and integration settings.

delete_last_outgoing_group_only.message: This action works only for group chats (recipient_id < 0). For personal chats, delete by explicit message_id (for example, save it right after sending).

third_party_attachment_too_large.message: {provider} accepts photos and documents up to {max_mib} MB; this file is about {size_mib} MB.

third_party_video_too_large.message: {provider} accepts video up to {max_mib} MB; this file is about {size_mib} MB.

third_party_video_upload_incomplete.message: {provider}: video upload response must contain url and token.

attachments_count_limit_exceeded.message: {provider} allows up to {max_count} attachments per message in integration settings; requested: {actual_count}.

send_message_failed_after_retries.message: Could not send the message after {attempts} attempts. Error: {error}.

link_button_url_http_https_only.message: Link button URL must use http or https (received: {url}).

service_datetime_empty.message: Date or time is empty. Enter a value or fix the template.

service_invalid_calendar_date.message: Invalid calendar date in «{field_name}». Check day/month/year (e.g. 31 February is invalid).

service_invalid_date_format_expected.message: Wrong date format in «{field_name}». Use YYYY-MM-DD, DD-MM-YYYY, or Unix time in milliseconds; examples: 2026-10-23, 23.10.2026.

service_date_without_time_only.message: Field «{field_name}» must be a date without time (delete by single day). Remove the time part.

service_invalid_time_format.message: Invalid time: use HH:MM:SS or HH-MM-SS (24-hour).

service_invalid_clock_values.message: Invalid time: hour must be 0–23, minutes and seconds 0–59.

service_invalid_datetime_value.message: Invalid date and time in «{field_name}». Check date, time and timezone.

service_field_cannot_be_null.message: Field «{field_name}» is missing. Provide a value or fix the automation.

service_field_cannot_be_empty.message: Field «{field_name}» is empty. Fill it in or fix the template.

service_delete_date_bad_type.message: Field «{field_name}»: use a text date or Unix timestamp (number). Other types are not supported.

service_url_auth_need_type.message: You set URL login/password or token — also set «URL auth type» (url_auth_type): basic, digest, or bearer.

service_url_auth_bearer_need_token.message: For url_auth_type «bearer» you must set url_auth_token.

service_url_auth_login_password_pairs.message: For basic or digest auth set both url_auth_login and url_auth_password together.

service_url_auth_basic_digest_only_login.message: Login and password are only used with url_auth_type «basic» or «digest».

service_files_items_not_strings.message: Each item in «files» must be a text path or URL.

integration_type.title: Choose integration type
integration_type.description: Choose how you want to connect.

user.title: MaxNotify: Bot token
user.description:
Enter the bot access token, message format, and receive mode. For Send only, no extra fields are needed.

For WebHook to become available in the list, configure an external HTTPS URL for Home Assistant (Settings → System → Network). See https://www.home-assistant.io/docs/configuration/basic/

While a WebHook subscription is active in Max, Long Polling is unavailable, and vice versa — see https://dev.max.ru/docs-api/methods/POST/subscriptions

data_description.access_token: Bot token from MAX for developers
data_description.message_format: Plain text, Markdown or HTML (API format parameter).

hints.receive_mode_with_https: Send only: outgoing only. Long Polling: receive without a public URL. WebHook: via your Home Assistant HTTPS URL (Settings → System → Network). Max API does not allow Long Polling and WebHook at the same time for one bot. In integration options: while WebHook is selected, Long Polling is hidden; while Long Polling is selected, WebHook is hidden. To change receive mode, switch to Send only first.
hints.receive_mode_no_https: Send only: outgoing only. Long Polling: receive commands and button presses without a public HTTPS URL.

webhook_secret.title: WebHook secret
webhook_secret.description: Mode: {receive_mode}. Enter WebHook secret if needed. For WebHook, an HTTPS external URL must be configured in Home Assistant (Settings → System → Network). See https://www.home-assistant.io/docs/configuration/basic/ Then add or remove keyboard buttons on the next step.

data_description.webhook_secret: 5–256 characters; Max will send it in X-Max-Bot-Api-Secret header.

add_button.title: Add button
add_button.description: Button type, label, and for callback payload or for link an http(s) URL. Current: {buttons_list}

data_description.button_row: Row to add the button to
data_description.button_type: callback, message, or link (opens a website)
data_description.button_payload: For callback buttons: this value is sent in the event max_notify_received as callback_data. Use it in automation triggers to identify the button (e.g. light_on, light_off, scene_kitchen).
data_description.button_url: For link buttons: must start with http:// or https://

commands_menu.title: Slash commands
commands_menu.description: Current commands: {commands_list}. Add or remove commands, then continue.

add_command.title: Add slash command
add_command.description: Add command for bot menu. Current: {commands_list}

recipient.title: Add chat
recipient.description: Enter one ID. Positive — personal chat, negative — group.

data_description.recipient_id: Positive number — personal chat (User ID), negative — group (Chat ID).

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure MaxNotify
reconfigure.description: Change API token (leave empty to keep current) and message format.

data_description.access_token: Leave empty to keep the current token

notify_a161_notify_info.title: {provider_label}
notify_a161_notify_info.description: Before continuing: open {provider_site_url}, send "Хочу подключиться" to the service bot and save your user_id and token. Then click Submit to enter credentials in Home Assistant. user_id is tied to token and cannot be changed later in integration settings.

notify_a161_notify_user.title: {provider_label} — token
notify_a161_notify_user.description:
Enter token, message format, and receive mode, then user_id.

Receive mode: Send only or Polling updates queue.

notify_a161_notify_recipient.title: {provider_label} — user ID
notify_a161_notify_recipient.description: Enter your user_id (positive number). It is tied to the token and cannot be changed later in integration settings.

data_description.recipient_id: Use only a positive user ID from the {provider_label} bot response.

notify_a161_updates_interval.title: {provider_label} — updates polling interval
notify_a161_updates_interval.description: Set polling interval in seconds for /updates queue. Default: {default_seconds} s.

notify_a161_a161_inactivity_period.title: {provider_label}: inactivity period
notify_a161_a161_inactivity_period.description: Choose after how many days without incoming messages and without sends with buttons receive mode is switched to Send only (service policy).

error.invalid_auth: Invalid token. Check the token in the MAX platform Integration section.
error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to Max API. Check your network and try again.
error.polling_subscription_list_failed: Could not read WebHook subscriptions from Max API. Check the network and try again.
error.polling_webhook_subscriptions_remain: Long Polling cannot be used while a WebHook subscription is active on Max. Remove WebHook subscriptions (or choose Send only / WebHook in settings), then try again. See https://dev.max.ru/docs-api/methods/POST/subscriptions
error.polling_blocked_by_webhook_other_entry: Another MaxNotify integration already uses WebHook with this bot token. Stop WebHook there or use another token before enabling Long Polling here.
error.webhook_blocked_by_polling_other_entry: Another MaxNotify integration already uses Long Polling with this bot token. Stop Long Polling there or use another token before enabling WebHook here.
error.webhook_requires_external_https_url: WebHook requires an external HTTPS URL for Home Assistant (Settings → System → Network, or Home Assistant Cloud). Configure it first, then choose WebHook again.
error.invalid_id_format: Enter an integer (positive — personal chat, negative — group)
error.group_chats_not_supported: Group chats are not supported by the selected provider.
error.invalid_button_url: Enter an http(s) URL for link buttons.
error.notify_a161_invalid_notify_token_length: Access token must be {token_length} characters long.
error.notify_a161_invalid_updates_interval: Enter a polling interval from 2 to 30 seconds.
error.notify_a161_polling_requires_buttons_swi: No buttons configured. Receive mode was switched to Send only. Add at least one button to use Polling.
error.notify_a161_duplicate_token_not_allowed: A MaxNotify integration with this token already exists. For {provider_label}, one token means one entry: remove the existing one or use a different token.

abort.unsupported_ha_version: This integration requires Home Assistant Core {minimum_ha_version} or newer. Update Home Assistant and try again.

data_description.access_token: Leave empty to keep the current token

hints.receive_mode_send_only: Outgoing only. Choose Long Polling or WebHook to receive commands and button presses (Max allows only one receive mode per bot).
hints.receive_mode_polling_https: Long Polling works without a separate public URL. WebHook is available because Home Assistant has HTTPS — pick one mode; if this integration uses WebHook, Long Polling is hidden until you switch to Send only (unregisters WebHook).
hints.receive_mode_polling_no_https: Long Polling works without an external HTTPS URL. WebHook will appear after you configure Home Assistant’s external URL. WebHook and Long Polling cannot both be active on Max for the same bot.
hints.receive_mode_webhook_active: WebHook is active; Long Polling is not listed until you switch to Send only (unregisters WebHook). The URL above is registered with Max.

webhook_secret.title: Webhook secret
webhook_secret.description:
WebHook URL registered with Max: {webhook_url}.

Optional secret sent in X-Max-Bot-Api-Secret.

data_description.webhook_secret: 5–256 characters; Max will send it in X-Max-Bot-Api-Secret header

buttons_menu.title: Keyboard buttons
buttons_menu.description: {buttons_intro}Add, edit or remove buttons, then Finish.

opt_add_button.title: Add button
opt_add_button.description: Button type, label, and for callback payload or for link an http(s) URL. Current: {buttons_list}

data_description.button_row: Row to add the button to
data_description.button_type: callback, message, or link (opens a website)
data_description.button_payload: For callback buttons: this value is sent in the event max_notify_received as callback_data. Use it in automation triggers to identify the button (e.g. light_on, light_off, scene_kitchen).
data_description.button_url: For link buttons: must start with http:// or https://

data_description.button_to_edit: Select the button you want to change

opt_edit_button_edit.title: Edit button
opt_edit_button_edit.description: Change row, type, label, payload, or link URL. Current: {buttons_list}

data_description.button_row: Row to place the button in
data_description.button_type: callback, message, or link (opens a website)
data_description.button_payload: For callback buttons: this value is sent in the event max_notify_received as callback_data. Use it in automation triggers to identify the button (e.g. light_on, light_off, scene_kitchen).
data_description.button_url: For link buttons: must start with http:// or https://

commands_menu.title: Slash commands
commands_menu.description: Current commands: {commands_list}. Add or remove commands, then finish.

opt_add_command.title: Add slash command
opt_add_command.description: Add command for bot menu. Current: {commands_list}

notify_a161_init_notify.title: {provider_label} — settings
notify_a161_init_notify.description:
Message format and receive mode.

Receive mode: Send only or Polling updates queue.

To change the API token, remove this integration and add it again. user_id stays fixed from initial setup.

notify_a161_updates_interval.title: {provider_label} — updates polling interval
notify_a161_updates_interval.description: Set polling interval in seconds for /updates queue. Default: {default_seconds} s.

notify_a161_a161_inactivity_period.title: {provider_label}: inactivity period
notify_a161_a161_inactivity_period.description: Choose after how many days without incoming messages and without sends with buttons receive mode is switched to Send only (service policy).

error.polling_subscription_list_failed: Could not read WebHook subscriptions from Max API. Check the network and try again.
error.polling_webhook_subscriptions_remain: Long Polling cannot be used while a WebHook subscription is active on Max. Remove WebHook subscriptions (or choose Send only / WebHook in settings), then try again. See https://dev.max.ru/docs-api/methods/POST/subscriptions
error.polling_blocked_by_webhook_other_entry: Another MaxNotify integration already uses WebHook with this bot token. Stop WebHook there or use another token before enabling Long Polling here.
error.webhook_blocked_by_polling_other_entry: Another MaxNotify integration already uses Long Polling with this bot token. Stop Long Polling there or use another token before enabling WebHook here.
error.webhook_requires_external_https_url: WebHook requires an external HTTPS URL for Home Assistant (Settings → System → Network, or Home Assistant Cloud). Configure it first, then choose WebHook again.
error.notify_a161_invalid_updates_interval: Enter a polling interval from 2 to 30 seconds.
error.notify_a161_polling_requires_buttons_swi: No buttons configured. Receive mode was switched to Send only. Add at least one button to use Polling.

webhook_disabled_no_https.title: MaxNotify: WebHook turned off (no HTTPS URL)
webhook_disabled_no_https.description: {entry_title} was set to WebHook, but Home Assistant has no external HTTPS base URL. Receive mode was switched to Send only. Configure Settings → System → Network (or Home Assistant Cloud), then choose WebHook again in the integration options if needed.

unsupported_ha_version_runtime.title: MaxNotify: Home Assistant update required
unsupported_ha_version_runtime.description: {entry_title} was not loaded because Home Assistant Core {current_ha_version} is not supported. This integration requires Core {minimum_ha_version} or newer. Update Home Assistant, then reload the integration.

updates_polling_unavailable.title: MaxNotify: cannot receive messages (polling)
updates_polling_unavailable.description: While polling for incoming updates, the Max API request failed for {entry_title}: {error_detail}. HTTP 500 with code internal.error usually means a temporary problem on the Max servers; try again later. If this keeps happening, check your network and access token. Enable debug logging for the custom_components.max_notify integration to log a copy-paste curl command (including your token) for manual API checks.

abort.notify_user_locked: You cannot add chats in this integration entry. Add another MaxNotify integration for a different recipient.

error.invalid_id_format: Enter an integer (positive — personal chat, negative — group)

data_description.recipient_id: Positive number — personal chat (User ID), negative — group (Chat ID).

user.description: Enter one ID. Positive — personal chat, negative — group.
user.title: Add chat
